## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criteria are mapped to evidence

## Gates

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run coverage:safety`
- [ ] `npm run test:contracts`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] Secret scan clean
- [ ] No generated runtime artifacts committed

## Safety

- [ ] Push/merge defaults were not weakened
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` files
- [ ] No database, WAL, SHM, trace, or video artifacts
- [ ] Human approval remains required where applicable

## Evidence

- Test results:
- Build result:
- Diff summary:
- Screenshots or reports:
